grant_title: Grants for After School Programs in New Jersey
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; open to organizations serving New Jersey communities.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, schools, and community organizations in New Jersey that operate or plan to operate after-school programs. Applicants must be tax-exempt under Section 501(c)(3) or equivalent, or have a fiscal sponsor. Programs should focus on educational, recreational, or developmental activities for children and youth.
